summary: Full E2E testing of Topchampion landing page. Backend: 10/10 pytest cases pass (health, create lead, persistence, sort desc, no _id, required-field 422s, invalid enum 422s). Frontend: 17/17 Playwright checks pass — landing sections render, hero CTAs work, EN/CN toggle switches headline content, nav links scroll, submit disabled when empty, smart-quote form submits successfully and quote-success block appears, footer with social links rendered.

issues: Chinese headline shows duplicated phrasing: '以精密自动化与绿色能源 精密自动化 与 绿色能源融合.' — looks like title_a already contains '精密自动化与绿色能源' which then repeats via title_b/title_c. Suggest reviewing i18n/content.js CN title_a so the three coloured spans don't visually duplicate.

action_items: (Optional polish) Fix CN hero headline duplication in /app/frontend/src/i18n/content.js — title_a should not already include the words rendered by title_b/title_c.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — prefer FastAPI lifespan handler (non-blocking).
LeadCreate accepts EmailStr but model_dump may still leave email=null on disk; insertion converts datetime to isoformat manually — consider Pydantic json mode for consistency.
CORS allow_origins falls back to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; should be explicit list in production.
GET /api/leads has no pagination cursor beyond `limit` query and no auth — exposes all lead PII publicly. HIGH PRIORITY for production hardening (out of scope for this iteration but worth flagging).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed lead documents in MongoDB `leads` collection via API during tests; safe to leave or purge by prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_leads.py covers all lead-API contracts. Frontend Playwright covers landing-root, nav links, hero CTAs, lang toggle (EN/CN), and the full smart-quote submit flow using data-testid='industry-bess' / 'plc-siemens'. Shadcn Select dropdowns work fine with force=True clicks plus a 400ms wait. /api/leads returns lead documents without _id (excluded server-side).
rca of the issue: No bugs found in tested flows. Only a minor CN i18n content duplication identified as a design polish item.
